strengths: Linear attention reduces prefill latency by 81.3% at seq_len=512, head_dim=64.
Linear attention reduces peak memory from 6.32MB to 0.68MB.
weaknesses: inconclusive: Linear attention approximation error is large: relative L2 error = 0.767 (>= 0.5); may not be a drop-in replacement.
Confirmed result but no submission_bundle produced.
required_revisions: Generate a manuscript bundle via PaperOrchestra.

evidence_blockers.statement: Throughput scales linearly in sequence length up to 32k tokens.
